OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Creates an application form record, associates with relevant recruitment requisition through an application form relation, and then creates document checklist items for the uploaded job application documents.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreateApplicationFormAndRelatedRecords

omniProcessElements.name: CreateApplicationForm
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "FirstName" : "%FirstName%", "LastName" : "%LastName%", "RequisitionID" : "%RequisitionID%", "personAccountId" : "%personAccountId%", "recruitmentRequisitionId" : "%recruitmentRequisitionId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "" : "" }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentCreateApplicationForm1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "applicationFormId", "responseJSONPath" : "ApplicationForm_1:Id", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: GetApplicationFormDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentGetApplicationDetails", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataRaptorExtractAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: CreateDocumentChecklistItemsForNewCertificates
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContentDocumentId" : "%NewCertificates:data%", "FileName" : "%NewCertificates:filename%", "ParentRecordId" : "%applicationFormId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentCreateDocumentChecklistItem", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: CreateDocumentChecklistItemsForPreviousUploadedDocuments
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContentDocumentId" : "%PreviousUploadedDocuments:ContentDocumentId%", "FileName" : "%PreviousUploadedDocuments:FileName%", "ParentRecordId" : "%applicationFormId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentCreateDocumentChecklistItem", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: CreateContentDocumentLinksForResume
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "File:data" : "%Resume:data%", "LinkedEntityId" : "%applicationFormId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentCreateContentDocumentLinks", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction5", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: CreateDocumentChecklistItemsForResume
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContentDocumentId" : "%Resume:data%", "FileName" : "%Resume:filename%", "ParentRecordId" : "%applicationFormId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentCreateDocumentChecklistItem", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: UpdatePreliminaryApplicationReference
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "RecruitmentUpdatePreliminaryApplicationReference", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataRaptorPostAction6", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "PreliminaryApplicationRefId", "sendJSONPath" : "PreliminaryApplicationRefId", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "description" : "", "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "labelPlural" : "", "labelSingular" : "", "linkToExternalObject" : "", "mockResponseMap" : { }, "nameColumn" : "", "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "rollbackOnError" : true, "trackingCustomData" : { }, "ttlMinutes" : 5 }
